allow: Bash(python -c "import asyncio, sys; sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\); from dotenv import load_dotenv; load_dotenv\(\); import discord_reader as dc; result = asyncio.run\(dc.bittensor_discord_context\(\)\); print\(result[:800] if result else 'EMPTY'\)")
Bash(python -c "from web3 import Web3; sig = 'query\(uint256,bytes32\)'; selector = Web3.keccak\(text=sig\).hex\(\)[:10]; print\(f'Signature: {sig}'\); print\(f'Selector:  {selector}'\)")
